topic_coverage.quoted_user_text: Restore financegnome.omniflow.cc production UX: Chat/AI and nav work without useAuth crashes when OIDC is unset (AUTH_DEV_BYPASS); all six /analytics/{slug} Grafana iframes load assets under /analytics/grafana/public/ not site-root /public/ 404s.

Defect A: frontend main.tsx conditional AuthProvider (Q0005), AppLayout.tsx, ChatPanel.tsx, App.tsx ProtectedRoute split. Defect B: backend Grafana reverse proxy, docker-compose Grafana env, AnalyticsPage iframe src, DEC-0057 / US-0011 proxy contract.

US-0010 external profile with Traefik basic-auth, AUTH_DEV_BYPASS=true, OIDC not configured; must not break OIDC-enabled deploys; DEC-0057 rejected GF_SERVER_SERVE_FROM_SUB_PATH in sprint—fix may need GF_SERVER_ROOT_URL or proxy path rewrite; wallet extension console noise out of scope.

Omniflow smoke: no AuthProvider/useAuth console errors; AI Chat button opens panel; each /analytics/* route loads Grafana without site-root /public/ 404; automated frontend test or proxy integration test where feasible; regression on OIDC-configured path.
Operator confirms financegnome.omniflow.cc Chat usable and all six analytics dashboards render; BUG-0001 acceptance rows checked; fix released or quick-sprint verified on external profile.

decomposition.rationale: Same operator report (2026-06-03), environment (US-0010 external / financegnome.omniflow.cc), and post-release smoke session; sub-defects A (auth) and B (Grafana assets) tracked under one BUG-0001 for discovery decomposition.
alternatives_considered: BUG-0001 auth-only + BUG-0002 grafana-only — rejected for intake to avoid duplicate environment/evidence blocks; fixes remain independently testable via sub-defect acceptance rows
